reviews.comment:
Siempre limpio y agua caliente. Ideal para el primer descanso, rumbo a la costa.

(Translated by Google)
Always clean and with hot water. Ideal for the first break on the way to the coast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqOWJpd29BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar..tranquilo..caro como toda estación de servicio saliendo de capital pero...le pongo 5 estrellas porque había un dispenser de AGUA CALIENTE PARA EL MATE GRATIS y aunque parezca raro me sentí bien porque parece que todo tiene precio y ese dispenser parecía una gran excepción..(en otros lados el agua 500$)GRACIAS TARAGUI POR LA INICIATIVA.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place...quiet...expensive like all gas stations outside the capital but...I'm giving it 5 stars because there was a FREE HOT WATER DISPENSER FOR MATE and although it seems strange I felt good because it seems like everything has a price and that dispenser seemed like a great exception...(elsewhere water costs $500) THANK YOU TARAGUI FOR THE INITIATIVE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqdGZyNnRRRRAB

El parque alrededor muy lindo.

The surrounding park was very nice.
